name: Marshmallow Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange marshmallows on a cookie sheet or jelly roll pan and freeze for 15 minutes.
2. Microwave chocolate chips on high for 2 1/2 minutes, stirring every minute until smooth.
3. Using a skewer or fondue fork, dip each frozen marshmallow into the melted chocolate until completely coated.
4. Roll the marshmallow in coconut or decorative candies.
5. Use another fork or metal spatula to place the marshmallow on waxed paper lined cookie sheet or jelly roll pan.
6. Chill or keep in a cool dry place.
